title: <div>  •  Each week is assigned an astrological sign that aligns with the era of
content:
• Each week is assigned an astrological sign that aligns with the era of literature covered.
• Tarot & astrology will influence the Fate Wheel, buffs, and player decisions.

✔ Example Weekly Pairings:
• Week 2 (Greek Mythology) → Tarot: The Fool | Astrology: Aries (beginnings, reckless ambition)
• Week 6 (Medieval Literature) → Tarot: The Hanged Man | Astrology: Scorpio (sacrifice, transformation)
• Week 9 (Romanticism & Revolution) → Tarot: The Tower | Astrology: Aquarius (radical change, destruction & rebirth)
• Week 12 (Modernism & Absurdism) → Tarot: The Moon | Astrology: Pisces (illusion, dreams vs. reality)

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Deepens the narrative connections to myth, literature, and fate.
✔ Gives students an extra thematic lens through which to interpret weekly content.
✔ Provides symbolic cohesion between literature, history, and game mechanics.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 512 (chunk 512/555)
